title: Battle of New Holgha
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Attack on the Vinsoth system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of the Shaum Hii system]] |image=[[File:CiutricARROWED-TEA.png]] |name=Battle of New Holgha |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] |place=[[New Holgha]]''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' |result=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] victory |side1=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side2=*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] empire *[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] *[[Subaltern]] [[Bur'lorr]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=1 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] |forces2=*[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] *At least one [[miid ro'ik]] **At least one [[Qworlth skaal|dread weapon]] *[[Yaret-Kor|Magma weapons]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Numerous [[New Holghan]]s |casual2=*Bur'lorr *[[Briika Jeban]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|At least the New Republic can evacuate the next target before they show."
"Yes. Let's see what happens at New Holgha.|Goran Beviin and Boba Fett on Birgis|}} A '''battle''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[New Holgha]] three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] into the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong War|attempt to overthrow]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. The governing [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], believing [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Intelligence/Legends|intelligence]] to be faulty due to the Mandalorians' public alliance with the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] Yuuzhan Vong, falsely deduced that the target of the invaders was [[Pedd Four|Pedd 4]], and withdrew most of New Holgha's defenses there. Resultantly, New Holgha fell to the Yuuzhan Vong with little resistance. [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalorian leader]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] encountered a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] while assisting the Yuuzhan Vong on New Holgha, and recruited him to reliably pass on vital intelligence to the New Republic. ==Prelude== {{Quote|And what happens when the New Republic praises its brave Mando allies for slipping intel to them? It's going to happen. And "oops" won't cut it with the Vong."
"Then I'll swallow my nausea, and payday with the Vong is over.|Goran Beviin and Boba Fett on Birgis|}} In [[25 ABY]], during the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong War|attempted conquest]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the marauding [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] [[Battle of Birgis|attacked]] the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Birgis]]. Maintaining a public image of collaboration with the Yuuzhan Vong, [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|leader]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and his [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] attempted to funnel [[Intelligence/Legends|intelligence]] on the invaders to the governing [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Employing a [[Unidentified pilot (Birgis)|pilot]] at Birgis to deliver the information, Fett hoped that the New Republic would be able to evacuate the site of a future Yuuzhan Vong conquest—the Outer Rim world of [[New Holgha]], which would be attacked in three [[Standard month/Legends|months]]' [[Time/Legends|time]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|How long does it take to evacuate a planet, anyway? Where do you put displaced worlds at a few weeks' notice?"
"I don't need you to make me feel better about it."
"Just saying it wouldn't have made much difference numerically even if the New Republic ''had'' believed the intel we gave them. Millions were still going to die either way.|Goran Beviin and Boba Fett on New Holgha|}} The New Republic, however, believed that the Mandalorians had fed them misinformation, and relocated New Holgha's garrison to the Republic stronghold at the astronomical object''[[The Essential Atlas]]''—Based on corresponding data for [[Pedd system/Legends|Pedd system]] [[Pedd Four]], believing it to be the Yuuzhan Vong's actual goal. Left without any considerable defensive capability, and with its long-range defensive satellite sabotaged overnight, New Holgha fell without much resistance to Yuuzhan Vong forces fresh from the [[Attack on the Vinsoth system|conquest]] of the nearby [[Vinsoth system/Legends|Vinsoth system]]. The Yuuzhan Vong assailed the planet's [[Five Holy Cities]] with [[Yaret-Kor|magma weapons]] and took the opportunity to refuel one of their living [[miid ro'ik]] [[Warship/Legends|warships]] by using a [[Qworlth skaal|dread weapon]] to scavenge raw materials from the planet's surface. Fett, watching the vessel consume [[Tree/Legends|trees]], buildings, and [[New Holghan]] people, was uncomfortably reminded of his experiences inside a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] creature in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]];''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' he was dispelled from his unease, however, by a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] transmission from the Yuuzhan Vong [[subaltern]] [[Bur'lorr]]. The subaltern had encountered and briefy combated a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], and tasked Fett and his fellow Mandalorians to run him down and capture him. Fett and the Protectors trailed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] through the main marketplace of the Five Holy [[City/Legends|Cities]] and cornered him in an alleyway. Spotting the chance to convey intelligence to the New Republic through a more reliable channel, Fett passed more information to the Jedi Knight, who identified himself as [[Kubariet]], and assigned his comrade [[Tiroc Vhon]] to escort Kubariet to safety. Bur'lorr arrived; demanding the location of his quarry, he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Mandalorian [[Goran Beviin]]. The Yuuzhan Vong's dying shouts were quelled by nearby [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] fire and so did not alert any other Yuuzhan Vong in the area, but the Mandalorians' victory over the warrior was not without bloodshed; Protector [[Briika Jeban]] was injured by the claws of Bur'lorr's [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|living armor]], and died. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Every time we meet the New Republic, we'll remind them we fight for the Vong. It has to be that way for this game to work."
"But you're fighting two wars at once. Fighting for the New Republic and defending yourselves against us, too."
"We'll manage okay.|Boba Fett and Kubariet on Vorpa'ya|}} The loss of Jeban meant that her daughter, [[Dinua Jeban|Dinua]], needed a new [[Parent/Legends|parent]], and so Beviin adopted her. After taking New Holgha as part of their [[Yuuzhan Vong empire|empire]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of the Shaum Hii system|attacked]] the [[Shaum Hii system/Legends|Shaum Hii system]]. The [[Pedd system/Legends|Pedd system]] had also fallen to the Yuuzhan Vong by [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. Two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the New Holgha campaign, Kubariet tracked Fett down to the world of [[Vorpa'ya]] in the [[Mandalore sector/Legends|Mandalore sector]] and arranged to keep the public image of the Mandalorian collaboration with the Yuuzhan Vong intact while the Mandalorians continued to ferry vital intelligence to the New Republic. ==Behind the scenes== The Battle of New Holgha first appeared in [[Karen Traviss]]' [[2006]] [[eBook]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Nueva Holgha |pl=Bitwa o Nową Holghę }} {{DEFAULTSORT:New Holgha, battle of}} [[Category:Battles in the Ciutric sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
